mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kpi_benchmark_alarm (create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted, organization_id, benchmark_id, symbol, value, grade, sort) VALUES
(#{item.createTime}, #{item.createId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateId}, #{item.deleted},#{item.organizationId}, #{item.benchmarkId}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.value}, #{item.grade},#{item.sort})

update.foreach: UPDATE kpi_benchmark_alarm SET update_id = #{item.updateId}, deleted = #{item.deleted}, organization_id = #{item.organizationId}, benchmark_id = #{item.benchmarkId}, symbol = #{item.symbol}, value = #{item.value}, grade = #{item.grade}, sort = #{item.sort} WHERE id = #{item.id}
